parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The Solace connection name to use.

parameter.name: cacheName
parameter.description: REQUIRED. The name of a PubSub+ Cache Instance configured on the broker for this VPN. The instance must be deployed, joined to the VPN, and configured to cache the requested topic pattern.

parameter.name: topicPattern
parameter.description: REQUIRED. The topic (or wildcard pattern) to retrieve cached messages for. The cache instance must already be subscribed to this pattern administratively.

parameter.name: cacheMaxMessages
parameter.description: Maximum number of cached messages to request (0 = unlimited per Solace API).

parameter.name: cacheMaxAgeSeconds
parameter.description: Maximum age of cached messages in seconds (0 = any age).

parameter.name: cacheRequestTimeout
parameter.description: Maximum time the cache request itself may take in milliseconds (default: 10000).

parameter.name: liveDataAction
parameter.description: How live messages on the same topic interleave with cached delivery: FULFILL (cache then live), FLOW_THRU (interleave), QUEUE (queue live until cache done). Default: FULFILL.

parameter.name: responseVariable
parameter.description: The name of the variable to which the result JSON (with messages array) is stored.

parameter.name: overwriteBody
parameter.description: Unused for cache request — messages are returned via the response variable.
